posts.text: The war in Iran continues to rage on and the American people still don’t have any answers as to what the plan even is. Join me and @Mehdi Hasan this week on our podcast Assembly Required to hear more. Tune in at the link in my bio or wherever you get your podcasts #fyp #politics

Trump's pressure campaign against Anthropic shows we are entering a future where the government could harness the power of AI against its own people. I wrote about this and more on my Substack, Assembly Notes. Subscribe at the link in my bio! #fyp #ai #politics
Head to my Substack at the link in bio for the full conversation with Joseph Gordon-Levitt about movies, faith, AI, and much more 🔗  #faith #fyp

This week’s episode of our podcast Assembly Required is out now. Tune in as we talk about Trump’s war in Iran, the Oscars, and much more with  Sam Sanders and @hunter harris. Listen at the link in my bio or wherever you get your podcasts. #fyp #politics
🎧 Listen wherever you get your podcasts! #fyp
Join us this week on our podcast Assembly Required 🎧 Tune in wherever you get your podcasts #fyp
This week’s episode of our podcast Assembly Required is out now with @Joy Ann Reid 🎧 listen wherever you get your podcasts! #fyp
🚨 NEW episodes of our podcast Assembly Required every TUESDAY! Subscribe wherever you get your podcasts 🎧  #fyp #politics @Crookedmedia

This Christmas, we got the ultimate gift: a little more time with our family and another chance to hold each other close. Last year, my dad, Rev. Robert Abrams, was diagnosed with stage 4 metastatic gastric cancer. The news gripped our family, but like anyone who has been touched by illness, we came together and quickly sprung into action. I am grateful that I have been able to help my dad with good health coverage and support during his medical treatments. Every additional day we have him with
This year's first episode of our podcast Assembly Required is out now. I hope you'll take a listen wherever you get your podcasts! #fyp #venezuela #podcast
